THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEARY, ROGER WILLIAM WOOLLEY, MARIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 507 BUSH STREET #110, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL DEC-16-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICTION THRU 12-15-96. PLTF WAIVES UNPAID RENT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS DEFTS AGREE TO NOT DAMAGE PREMISES & BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY DAMAGE THEY HAVE CAUSED TO 12-15-96.
